name: Compania de Transporte de Energia Electrica en Alta Tension Transener S.A.
summary: Compa√É¬±√É¬≠a de Transporte de Energ√É¬≠a El√É¬©ctrica en Alta Tensi√É¬≥n Transener S.A. provides high-voltage electric power transport services in Argentina. The company operates and maintains transportation lines; connection and transformation equipment; reactive power equipment, such as reactors, capacitors, and synchronous compensators; and control equipment and communications related to the automations. It operates a network of 12,400 kilometers of transmission lines and 6,228 kilometers of lines. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
